memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Sullivan_Family_Sheet
memoryArtifacts.description:
This family sheet was found in papers of Mildred Evelyn Sullivan LNKH-8PV a granddaugher of Delos.

It was created by her brother Orville Oscar  Sullivan L6L2-JJB who had done a great deal of searching for ancestors. 

Many of the children of Delos appear to have had children.  None were entered at this time (7 July 2020) as I do not know their status

Nte that for Fay William the birth is Sept 21 not 2

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cornelious S Moore於1838年5月11日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭尤斯托時，他的父親Johannes Conrad Moore46歲，母親Susanna Nagel32歲。他於1864年與Mary Agnes Borland在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1880年住在美國愛阿華州法也特且於1910年住在美國愛阿華州法也特普利桑特 瓦利 堂史普。他於1861年登記服兵役。他去世於1914年12月12日在美國愛阿華州法也特埃爾金享年76歲，埋葬在美國愛阿華州法也特埃爾金埃爾金 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cornelious S Moore于1838年5月11日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭尤斯托时，他的父亲Johannes Conrad Moore46岁，母亲Susanna Nagel32岁。他于1864年与Mary Agnes Borland在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1880年住在美国艾奥瓦州法也特且于1910年住在美国艾奥瓦州法也特普利桑特 瓦利 堂史普。他于1861年登记服兵役。他去世于1914年12月12日在美国艾奥瓦州法也特埃爾金享年76岁，埋葬在美国艾奥瓦州法也特埃爾金埃爾金 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Moore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Moor
meanings: English, Irish, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Moore  .
German: variant of   Mohr  .

Dutch (also De Moor): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’ (from Latin maurus), or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a Moor. Compare De Moor .

variants.name: More
meanings: 1  Scottish, English:  see  Moore  .

variants.name: Morrin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot.
English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Morin, a diminutive of More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus); see Moore 2 and 3.
English: perhaps sometimes from the Middle English personal name Morwin (Old English Mōrwine, the first element of which is uncertain and the second wine ‘friend’).

variants.name: Mauro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Domenic, Giuseppe, Antonio, Carmine, Carmelo, Domenico, Gaetano, Nino, Pasquale.

Italian (mainly southern): from the personal name Mauro, derived from the Latin personal and ethnic name Maurus, borne by various early Christian saints and meaning ‘Moor, North African’. Compare Moore and Moro .

variants.name: Moresco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Primo, Gino, Luciano, Riccardo.
Italian:
(Morésco): from a medieval personal name or a nickname for someone from North Africa or a swarthy or dark-haired man, from medieval Latin Mauriscus ‘Moor’ (see Moore 2).

variants.name: Morey
meanings: Irish (Limerick and Cork): variant of   Moore   4.
English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Mory, a pet form of Amauri (see Amery ).
English: perhaps also a variant of   Moore   1–3.

variants.name: Morrell
meanings: English (northern): from the medieval personal name Morel, a diminutive of Middle English or Old French More. Compare Moore .
Americanized form of French   Morel  . Compare   Morell   3.

variants.name: Moores
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of Moore , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McMoore
meanings: Irish: variant of Moore 4, in which Mac- ‘son of’ has been prefixed in modern times to give the name (Ó Mórdha ‘descendant of Mórdha’) an unmistakably Gaelic identity.

variants.name: Moro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Mario, Alberto, Jorge, Lino, Luis, Luiz, Manuel, Ramiro, Adolfo, Aida.  Italian Angelo, Pino, Pio, Remo, Antonio, Ciro, Cosmo, Elio, Enrico, Geno, Giancarlo, Gino.
Spanish: nickname or ethnic name from moro ‘Moor’, from Latin Maurus ‘Moor, North African’.
Italian: nickname from moro ‘Moor’ (see Moore 2, compare 1 above), also ‘black-haired man’.

nameMeanings.name: Cornelious
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Roman family name, Cornélius, which is of uncertain origin, possibly a derivative of Latin cornu ‘horn’. This was the name of a 3rd-century pope who is venerated as a saint. The name was particularly popular in the Low Countries, and immigrants contributed to its frequency in the north of England from the 1400s. However, it is now seldom used in Britain.

historicEvents.description: U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries: 1849: Fayette, Iowa, United States
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The three day Battle of Gettysburg was one of the bloodiest of the American Civil War. Between the Confederates and Unions, somewhere between 46,000 and 51,000 people died that day.

historicEvents.title: First National Strike in U.S. Begins In Pittsburgh Against Pennsylvania Railroad
historicEvents.description: Coming out of an economic crisis, everyone was worried when cuts started happening in the railroad. They went on what would the great railroad strike of 1877.

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

historicEvents.title: The Movie Theater
historicEvents.description: The world’s first movie theater was located in Pittsburgh. It was referred to as a nickelodeon as at the time it only cost 5 cents to get in.

en.lifeSummary: When Cornelious S Moore was born on 11 May 1838, in Youngstown, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States, his father, Johannes Conrad Moore, was 46 and his mother, Susanna Nagel, was 32. He married Mary Agnes Borland in 1864, in Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Fayette, Iowa, United States in 1880 and Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, United States in 1910. He registered for military service in 1861. He died on 12 December 1914, in Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, United States, at the age of 76, and was buried in Elgin Cemetery, Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cornelious S Moore est né le 11 mai 1838, à Youngstown, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, Johannes Conrad Moore, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Susanna Nagel, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mary Agnes Borland en 1864, à Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis en 1880 et à Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis en 1910. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1861. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1914, à Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Elgin Cemetery, Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cornelious S Moore am 11. Mai 1838 in Youngstown, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johannes Conrad Moore 46 und seine Mutter Susanna Nagel 32. Er hat 1864 in Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Agnes Borland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1880 hat er in Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und 1910 in Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er hat sich 1861 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1914 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Elgin Cemetery, Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelious S Moore è nato il il 11 maggio 1838 nel Youngstown, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Johannes Conrad Moore, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Nagel, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mary Agnes Borland nel 1864, nel Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880 e nel Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1910. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1861. Morì il 12 dicembre 1914, nel Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Elgin Cemetery, Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Cornelious S Mooreが1838年5月11日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドイオウングストウンで生まれた時，父Johannes Conrad Mooreは46歳，母Susanna Nagelは32歳であった。1864年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドでMary Agnes Borlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットに，1910年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットプレアサント ヴァリー トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1861年に兵役登録をした。彼は1914年12月12日にアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットエルジンで76歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットエルジンエルジン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvan: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 더리 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Cornelious S Moore(이)가 1838년 5월 11일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 영스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johannes Conrad Moore(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Nagel(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1864년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에서 Mary Agnes Borland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1880년도에 미국 아이오와 주 파예트에서, 1910년도에 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 플리산트 발리 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1861년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1914년 12월 12일 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 엘긴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 엘긴 엘긴 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelious S Moore nasceu em 11 de maio de 1838, em Youngstown, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Johannes Conrad Moore, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Nagel, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Agnes Borland em 1864, em Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1880 e em Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1910. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1861. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1914, em Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Elgin Cemetery, Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cornelious S Moore родился 11 мая 1838 г. в местности енгстоун, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Johannes Conrad Moore было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Nagel, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Agnes Borland в 1864 г. в местности вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году и в местности плисант валли тоуншип, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1910 году. В 1861 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 12 декабря 1914 г. в местности элгин, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности элгин кеметири, элгин, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cornelious S Moore nació el 11 de mayo de 1838, en Youngstown, Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, Johannes Conrad Moore, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Susanna Nagel, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mary Agnes Borland en 1864, en Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1880 y en Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1910. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1861. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1914, en Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Elgin Cemetery, Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos.
